title: rainbow`s 3D Fishing Rod
description: A cool vanilla 3D fishing rod in the Minecraft style. Add depth and volume to your fishing tool!
body: **Check out my other resource packs!** ## 📥 Installation Drop into resource packs folder and activate in-game. Hey, Minecraft fans who love stunning resource packs! Introducing Rainbow's 3D Fishing Rod — a fully 3D model that replaces the vanilla 2D fishing rod with an awesome, volumetric, and stylish version. ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a8b6ee935f88406e2263745609bbe412b66cd4.png) ## **This resource pack is allowed to be used in modpacks.** **Will be updated soon!** **Gallery shows it in action! Feedback welcome. <3**
